title: Amendment to the Constitution of the Board of National Trust
description: Amendment to the Constitution of the Board of National Trust

iwtk lsok laLFkku] ¼Lo;a lsoh laxBu&ekufld eanrk cjsyh] mÙkj izns'k ds izfrfuf/k½** [Qk-la- 26&3@2013&MhMh&III] MkSyh pØcrhZ] la;qDr lfpo ewy vf/klwpuk] Hkkjr ds jkti=] vlk/kkj.k] Hkkx& II] [kaM&3] mi[kaM ¼ii½ esa dk-vk- la[;k 881 ¼v½ rkjh[k 22 flrEcj] 2000 }kjk izdkf'kr dh xbZ Fkh vkSj vafre la'kks/ku vf/klwpuk la[;k dk-vk- 3004 ¼v½ rkjh[k 20 flrEcj] 2016 ds }kjk fd;k x;k -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities NOTIFICATION New Delhi, 22nd June, 2017 S.O. 1976(E).--In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of Section 3 of the National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 (44 of 1999), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment number S.O.881 (E) dated the 22nd September, 2000 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, section 3, sub-section (ii), dated the 25th September, 2000, namely:- In the said notification, for serial numbers 2 to 4 and the entries related thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- ―2. Shri Guriqbal Singh Bedi Member Autism India Today (Representative from Voluntary Patiala, Punjab Organisation – Autism) 3. Ms. Seema Tuli Member Amar Jyoti Rehabilitation (Representative of Voluntary and Research Centre, Delhi Organisation – Cerebral Palsy) 4. Shri Pushp Pal Singh Member Pooja Sewa Sansthan (Representative from Voluntary Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh Organisation-Mental Retardation)‖. [F.No.26-03/2013-DD-III] DOLLY CHAKRABARTY, Jt. Secy. Note: The principle notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, section 3, sub-section (ii) vide number S.O.881(E), dated the 22nd September, 2000 and lastly amended vide notification number S.O.3004(E), dated the 20th September, 2016. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
